runtimeArgs: const h=require('http'),fs=require('fs'),path=require('path');const d='/Users/laminefaye/Desktop/mes sites web';h.createServer((q,r)=>{let f=path.join(d,q.url==='/'?'index.html':decodeURIComponent(q.url));fs.readFile(f,(e,data)=>{if(e){r.writeHead(404);r.end('Not found')}else{const ext=path.extname(f);const m={'html':'text/html','png':'image/png','jpg':'image/jpeg','JPG':'image/jpeg','PNG':'image/png'};r.writeHead(200,{'Content-Type':m[ext.slice(1)]||'text/plain'});r.end(data)}})}).listen(3456)
